title: parallel vecs msgs/bodies/timestamps unenforced by type system
description: AppState holds three parallel Vec fields (messages, message_bodies, message_timestamps) that must stay in sync. The invariant is documented in comments but nothing in the type system enforces it. Clear-on-chat-switch is split across apply_event (MessagesLoaded arm) and show_chat_list in main.rs — two call sites that must both be updated together. Adding a fourth derived field (e.g. message_sender_display) requires finding and updating apply_event, the chat-switch clear block, and any future load paths. A future maintainer has no compiler help — they will discover the missing sync at runtime via misaligned render output. Fix: wrap the three vecs into a struct MessageList { messages, bodies, timestamps } with a constructor that accepts Vec<Message> and computes the derived fields, and a clear() method. One type, one sync point.
